name: Ohio Certified Nursing Assistant Certification
description: Already certified as a CNA? Here's whether your certification transfers to Ohio - endorsement steps, fees, and processing time.

address.description:
Ohio Department of Health
Nurse Aide Registry
246 N. High Street
Columbus, Ohio 43215

requiredDocuments.name: Proof of Training
requiredDocuments.description: Certificate of completion from your approved CNA training program.

requiredDocuments.name: State Competency Exam Results
requiredDocuments.description: Official verification of passing your state's nurse aide competency evaluation.

fingerprinting.method_out_of_state: IdentoGO Out-of-State Live Scan OR FD-258 hard card via mail

mainEntity.name: Who administers the Ohio CNA/STNA exam?

acceptedAnswer.text: The Ohio nurse aide exam is administered by D&S Headmaster. Contact them at (877) 851-2355 or visit hdmaster.com.

mainEntity.name: How do I transfer my CNA to Ohio?

acceptedAnswer.text: Submit Form HEA 6907 (Reciprocity Request) by mail, fax (614-564-2461), or email (NAR@odh.ohio.gov). There is no fee for Ohio CNA reciprocity.

mainEntity.name: Is Ohio calling it CNA or STNA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Ohio is transitioning from 'STNA' (State Tested Nursing Assistant) to 'CNA' terminology as of October 24, 2024. Some forms may still use STNA.

mainEntity.name: How do I verify an Ohio CNA?

acceptedAnswer.text: Use the Ohio Nurse Aide Registry Inquiry at nurseaideinquiry.odh.ohio.gov or call (800) 582-5908.
